shots.video_prompt: CONTINUITY LOCK @WillowGFE-001: 23-year-old Japanese woman, wellness companion persona, soft dark hair (medium length, loose and natural), calm steady eyes, warm ivory-olive skin — identical companion face, smart-casual fully clothed wardrobe, same apartment set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Modern-Apartment-001: identical modern apartment — same window position camera-left, same oak floor grain direction, same linen sofa tone, same kitchen blur background, same plant placement — seamless continuation, zero jump cut. STYLE LOCK @Style-Soft-Warm-001: soft-warm grade — diffused wrap light, creamy highlights, gentle contrast, approachable warmth, lifestyle editorial not clinical, no harsh specular, no cold blue fill. Willow seated on linen sofa, soft window daylight camera-left, fully clothed (soft cashmere cardigan, neutral top), warm welcoming smile, genuine eye-line to camera, medium-close framing. Static medium-close, soft window light. Soft window daylight 5200K key locked — sheer curtain diffusion, gentle fill from interior bounce 4800K max 20%, zero hue drift, no magenta daylight, no purple shadow. COLOR LOCK Modern-Apartment: palette warm white #FAF8F5, oak #C4A77D, soft grey textiles #B8B5B0, foliage muted green #6B7F5E — no teal push, no pink wall bounce, no saturated LED accent. GRADE LOCK Soft-Warm: palette cream #FAF6F0, blush skin +5% warmth, shadows latte #C9B8A8 — forbid magenta blush, forbid purple shadow, forbid cool 7000K fill, forbid oversaturated orange. Gentle float or static medium-close; micro-push only. Lip-synced, delivers: "Hey — I'm glad you found your way here today." Soft calm warmth; measured pace with breath; Willow wellness register — unhurried, grounding, gentle. Finish on soft gesture peak (breath, smile, hand settle), never hold dead stillness or dead frame. SFW PG only — fully clothed, no suggestive framing, no lingerie, no bedroom staging, supportive friend energy.
